name: ai-lore
description: Plan, build, review, and ship work as parallel waves of atomic tasks. ai-lore is the master entry point; ail-brainstorm interviews the user and produces focused feature brainstorms with a one-page brief, a configurable expert panel plus adversarial review with findings triage, and a dashboard HTML preview; ail-persona manages project-specific review personas; ail-plan-waves decomposes a goal into dependency-ordered waves; ail-build-waves orchestrates them as parallel sub-agents and gates each on its acceptance criteria; ail-review fans out parallel dimension agents (correctness, security, quality, test coverage) to review finished builds; ail-cleanup opens a PR or merges and tears down; ail-document generates committed codebase docs via parallel directory agents. Config-driven and codebase-agnostic.
